excerpt: Current market commentary highlights supply-driven inflation and structural changes due to geopolitical tensions. Recent trends show energy and industrial material disruptions affecting inflation. Experts emphasize the need for diversified strategies to navigate these shifts.

content.introduction: Current market commentary highlights supply-driven inflation and structural changes due to geopolitical tensions. Recent trends show energy and industrial material disruptions affecting inflation. Experts emphasize the need for diversified strategies to navigate these shifts.
body: * [Mutual Fund & 529 accounts](https://my.accessportals.com/app/blk/login?redirectUrl=/us/individual/insights/blackrock-investment-institute/weekly-commentary?signInAppWithOkta=true "Mutual Fund & 529 accounts"). * [![](/blk-one01-c-assets/cache-1776782256000/include/one/css/blk/i/x-twitter-black.svg)X](https://x.com/share?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.blackrock.com%2Fus%2Findividual%2Finsights%2Fblackrock-investment-institute%2Fweekly-commentary&text=Stay%20tuned%20for%20insights%20on%20hot%20topics%20and%20latest%20trends%20in%20the%20financial%20market%20via%20the%20Weekly%20commentary%20by%20the%20BlackRock%20Investment%20Institute.). * [Linkedin](https://www.linkedin.com/shareArticle?mini=true&url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.blackrock.com%2Fus%2Findividual%2Finsights%2Fblackrock-investment-institute%2Fweekly-commentary&title=Weekly%20market%20commentary%20%7C%20BlackRock%20Investment%20Institute&summary=Stay%20tuned%20for%20insights%20on%20hot%20topics%20and%20latest%20trends%20in%20the%20financial%20market%20via%20the%20Weekly%20commentary%20by%20the%20BlackRock%20Investment%20Institute.&source=BlackRock). The big picture is that we are in a [world shaped by supply](https://www.blackrock.com/corporate/insights/blackrock-investment-institute/publications/global-macro-outlook/january-2022). The Middle East conflict has supercharged existing supply constraints and intensified [mega forces](https://www.blackrock.com/corporate/insights/blackrock-investment-institute/publications/mega-forces) – structural changes such as the energy transition, geopolitical fragmentation and AI disruption. Supply disruptions of energy, chemicals and other industrial materials are increasing inflation pressures, albeit with [disparate effects](https://www.blackrock.com/corporate/literature/market-commentary/weekly-investment-commentary-en-us-20260406-spotting-pockets-of-em-resilience.pdf) across regions. Read our past weekly market commentaries [here](https://www.blackrock.com/corporate/insights/blackrock-investment-institute/archives "Read our past weekly market commentaries."). **BlackRock Advisors (UK) Limited - Abu Dhabi Global Market (ADGM) Branch** is a Branch of a Foreign Company registered with the Abu Dhabi Global Market Registration Authority (Registered number 21523), with its office at Floor 25, Al Sila Tower, Abu Dhabi Global Market Square, Al Maryah Island, Abu Dhabi, UAE, and is regulated by the ADGM Financial Services Regulatory Authority (“FSRA”) to engage in the regulated activities of ‘Arranging Deals in Investments’; ‘Advising on Investments or Credit’ ‘Managing Assets’; and ‘Managing in a Collective Investment Fund’ (FRSA Reference 240099).

# Market Commentary. Financial markets are dynamic and awash in numbers and data. Northwestern Mutual's market commentary, written by our experts, simplifies the complexities of stocks, economics and policy to help you better understand our view about what's moving the market. A woman in a modern office reading Northwestern Mutual Wealth Management Company Weekly Market Commentary and analyzing the economic fallout of the Iran war and the blockade of the Strait of Hormuz, which has triggered a spike in global inflation and stalled Federal Reserve rate cuts. Young woman with laptop analyzes financial markets and her well-diversified stock portfolio, crafted with an expert financial advisor from Northwestern Mutual Wealth Management Company.
